title: fix(gptimage): migrate to eastus2 after Sweden Central content policy block
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: New horizons for GPT images
gist.blurb: We've migrated our GPT image generation models to a new region to ensure reliable, uninterrupted service. Keep those prompts flowing!
gist.summary: Migrated the GPT image generation backend to a new Azure region to restore service availability.
gist.impact: Users can once again generate images using the GPT models reliably.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee moving a glowing image-generating server or a potted code-plant to a new, sunny location, representing the migration to a new region.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny explorer's hat, carrying a glowing lime green (#ecf874) server box to a new sunny garden plot. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny explorer's hat, carrying a glowing lime green (#ecf874) server box to a new sunny garden plot. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
